current_new_reports.summary: User says the program launcher itself is not running / previous response addressed the wrong issue.
User says local security setup seemed done in web, but installed program does not run.
Hyunju setup says Naver account / neighbor messages needed. User opens settings, only sees API-key style local dialog, then nothing happens after save.
current_new_reports.mac_oracle_note: Neighbor messages are web task settings, not local security settings. Web copy should be improved separately.

open_settings_commands.dominant_failure: 로컬 보안 설정 창을 열 수 없습니다: can't invoke "tk" command: application has been destroyed
open_settings_commands.packaging_failure_sample: 로컬 보안 설정 창을 열 수 없습니다: Can't find a usable tk.tcl ... This probably means that tk wasn't installed properly.

recommended_windows_tests: Fresh install, click webapp 실행기 연결 five times, verify one AIMAX process and heartbeat within 15 seconds.
Click 로컬 설정 열기 ten times, alternating save, cancel, and window-close.
Verify no command ends with application has been destroyed.
Verify installed Tcl/Tk runtime exists and Tk dialog opens under normal and non-ASCII install paths.
Verify command status updates are clear when user cancels or when local failure occurs.
likely_root_cause_hypotheses: Headless Local Agent creates and destroys a new tk.Tk root for each local settings command, which is unstable after the first root is destroyed.
Windows protocol repeated launches and single-instance behavior may leave a background agent running without visible UI feedback.
Some Windows installer builds or install paths may not include or locate Tk/Tcl runtime correctly.
